text: Every person who is a filmmaker is someone who works in production. The set of directors contains someone who works in production. Consequently, every director is a filmmaker.

premise1.subject: filmmaker
premise1.raw_text: Every person who is a filmmaker is someone who works in production

premise2.subject: director
premise2.raw_text: The set of directors contains someone who works in production

conclusion.raw_text: Consequently, every director is a filmmaker
